x-enum-descriptions: Scans rewards for blocks and genesis.
Scans and sums supply on all accounts.
Verifies if full state trie is stored.
Dumps RLP data to a `.rlp` file with the block hash in the file name.
Dumps RLP data to the log output.
Does not trigger. Pruning can be triggered manually.
Triggers when the state DB size is above the specified threshold.
Triggers when the free disk space where the state DB is stored is below the specified threshold.
Shuts Nethermind down when pruning succeeds but leaves it running when fails.
Shuts Nethermind down when pruning completes, regardless of its status.
Provides a full trace of the EVM state throughout the execution of transactions at each op-code, including subcalls.
Provides Ethereum state difference detailing all altered portions of the state made due to the execution of transactions.
Includes block rewards in the trace when tracing full blocks.
Enables memory compaction with the large object heap (LOH) if `SweepMemory` is set to `Gen2`.
Stores the blob transactions in memory only.
Stores the blob transactions in the permanent storage.
Stores the blob transactions in the permanent storage with support for restoring reorganized transactions to the blob pool.
